item.name: Pel Frog
item.description:
Prized by the Pelupelu, these tiny frogs are often seen traversing the shallow waters of Downripple.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Easily mistaken for golden ornaments, these dainty amphibians are revered by the Pelupelu as harbingers of financial success. Indeed, some devotees keep the frogs as pets in small pots, hoping to profit from their alleged powers.
